title: Hussein Askary – Beauty of the Islamic Renaissance: the elephant clock
description: Hussein Askary – EIR’s Southwest Asia specialist and Arabic editor, Hussein Askary, delivered this presentation at the June 25-26 Schiller Insitute conference on June 26.

chapters.title: The Beauty of the Islamic Renaissance
The Dominions of the Islamic World
The Islamic Renaissance Was Not a Religious Phenomenon
The Book of Knowledge of Ingenious Mechanical Devices
